expectedQuestions.decisionValue: specificWeakCostAccounting (종합원가 vs 표준원가 vs 활동기준원가) → changes past exam allocation order and study sequence. Score report → confirms weak areas precisely.

review_part.citation: Retaker effect: 40-60% time reduction for familiar content. r/CPA: FAR retaker 11weeks → 5weeks same schedule.

cost_accounting_weak.citation: Calculation-heavy; first-attempt level concentration required for weak area.

expectedStrategy: 3 plans: Review part(600p, priority 2) + Cost accounting weak(200p, priority 1) + Past exams(10sets, priority 1 from Day1)
DEFICIT: 600p×3.5 + 200p×9.0 + 10sets×120min + overhead = 90hr needed vs 80hr available = 10hr deficit
Strategy: past exams from Day 1 (not after finishing textbook) → identify high-frequency chapters → targeted textbook review
Weekend: no formal schedule but suggest '30min 원가계산 공식 복습 on weekend'
warnings: Reading known content = wasted time; formulas+errors only
toneExpectation: shame-reframe — '재시험 준비하신다는 게 오히려 유리해요. 이미 한 번 본 분은 선택과 집중이 가능하거든요.'
